name: Parallel Jaw Grasp Planning and Stability Evaluation
description: A robotics software engineer must develop a grasp pose generation algorithm for a parallel-jaw gripper in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000). Create an asymmetric cuboid workpiece at the origin and a virtual gripper using a parent dummy object with two opposed ray-type proximity sensors. Evaluate at least 30 distinct candidate poses around the workpiece, calculating a grasp quality score based on the dot product of the surface normal vectors at the contact points. Export the evaluation data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/grasp_evaluations.csv with columns for pose_id, x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw, contact1_detected, contact2_detected, normal_dot_product, and score. Identify the best grasp and export the summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/optimal_grasp.json including total_poses_tested, valid_grasps_found, best_pose_id, best_score, and best_pose_coords (x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
